note: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 from WebFetch (21 bytes) — including with browser User-Agent — consistent with CDN/Cloudflare edge bot-detection blocking the sandbox IP. This is NOT a confirmed outage. SSL handshakes succeeded for all 8 domains (certs returned valid via openssl s_client), confirming servers are live. SSL certs show expiry 2026-06-05 (30 days from today). Threshold for warning is <30 days; today is exactly at boundary — no formal ssl_warning triggered, but certs should renew automatically within the next 24–48 hours. Note: yesterday's check (2026-05-05) showed expiry as 2026-06-04 — the 1-day shift to June 5 is likely a Vercel/Let's Encrypt edge-node provisioning difference, not a regression.
